params.name: Tail-burned Guqin
params.description:
On Oct 28, 192 AD, Cai Yong was imprisoned due to his comments on Dong Zhuo, and the Tail-burned Guqin was also taken into the national treasury.
The Tail-burned Guqin, one of the renowned ancient Chinese stringed instruments, was created by Cai Yong, a prominent literary figure of the Eastern Han Dynasty. Legend has it that Cai Yong rescued a charred piece of wood from a fire and transformed it into a magnificent seven-stringed instrument. The instrument, known for its exceptional and unmatc …
